economic_notes: Investment in N'Swakamok Forestry Corporation accounted for by equity method (20% interest). Mining and mineral agreements with local mining companies including Vale Canada Limited, KGHM International, and Glencore. Business enterprise operations included in financials. Ontario Power Generation settlement reserve of $1,559,657.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2022 (not 2024). No schedule of remuneration provided. Deferred revenue balance not separately stated on balance sheet but ISC deferred revenue ending balance is $2,448,915. CMHC Housing ($293,429) and General Housing ($134,414) combined for expenses_housing. Long-term debt includes loans payable to ISC (non-interest bearing, secured by promissory note). COVID-19 risks noted. Investment in N'Swakamok Forestry Corporation accounted for by equity method (20% interest). Total government transfers calculated as Provincial ($683,007) + Federal/ISC ($3,077,981) + CMHC ($136,846) = $3,897,834. OSR includes Ontario First Nations LP, KEB, mining agreements, Union of Ontario Indians, business enterprise, and other. Amortization in statement of changes in net debt shows $91,432 but segmented information and notes show $691,432 — the $91,432 figure in the cash flow statement appears to be a formatting/OCR issue; the correct figure per Note 8 is $691,432.
